reason: This is a standard hadith (prophetic narration) commonly shared by Muslims. It contains no extremist content and simply discusses a basic ruling about prayer timing.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه ان رسوالله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال (من ادرك ركعة من الصلاة فقد ادرك الصلاة) متفق عليه.
